title: El Ibex amortigua el revés del petróleo

summary: El secretario de Estado de Estados Unidos, Marco Rubio, asegura que el Gobierno del presidente Donald Trump "seguirá utilizando" todas las herramientas a su alcance para hacer frente a las "amenazas de seguridad" que plantea el régimen en Cuba con el objetivo de impulsar reformas económicas y políti

title: El absentismo es un cáncer, lo diga quien lo diga
summary: El alto absentismo es una lacra y reducir el debate a un tema semántico es propio de irresponsables. Leer

title: Spain's PM visits site of deadly Almería wildfire
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Monday visited the scene of one of Spain's deadliest wildfires in recent history, which has claimed 13 lives and razed a huge area.

title: Do home insurance companies in Spain cover fires?
summary: With wildfires becoming increasingly common in Spain, it's important to find out what your home insurance will cover in the event it gets damaged in one.

title: 'Final before final': Spain face France in World Cup blockbuster
summary: Spain will attempt to neutralise one of the most potent attacking arsenals in World Cup history on Tuesday at 9pm Madrid time when they take on France in a heavyweight semi-final showdown.

title: Which European countries are already using the EES pre-registration app?
summary: The EU's border agency Frontex developed an app allowing travellers to pre-register for its Entry/Exit System rollout. With the summer travel season upon us and queues expected at tourist hotspots, what happened to the app and which countries are using it?

title: Spanish Word of the Day: 'Incendio'
summary: You’re probably familiar with this word but do you know how it’s different from ‘fuego’ (the Spanish word for fire)?

title: Spain's ex-PM in hot water over 'xenophobic' remark about French team
summary: Spain's conservative ex-prime minister Mariano Rajoy faced criticism at home and in France Sunday after saying the neighbouring country's national football team had "no French players".

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Monday
summary: Spanish fire death toll rises to 13, bull-running Joker goes viral, Catalonia in the midst of its third summer heatwave and more news on Monday July 13th.

title: Hundreds return home as deadly Spain wildfire stabilised
summary: A wildfire that killed at least 12 people in the southern Spain has been stabilised, the head of the regional government of Andalusia, Juan Manuel Moreno, said Sunday.

title: MAP: How to find out where Spain's wildfires are
summary: Spain experiences wildfires over summer, threatening homes and causing devastation across thousands of hectares. Here's how to use Google to find out where active blazes are occurring.
